problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
